text:
## Network Tiers

**Tier 2 (Out-of-Network):** Non-contracted providers. Members pay the difference between the provider's billed charge and HealthGuard's allowed amount, in addition to standard out-of-network cost-sharing. Out-of-network costs do not count toward the in-network out-of-pocket maximum; a separate out-of-network OOP maximum of 2x the in-network amount applies on all plans.
